name: Powerful
description: One Die gains +1 Base Power.

name: Potential
description: One Die has its size increased by 1 stage (d8 to d10 etc. Max of d12)

name: Limited Power
description:
Can only be applied to skills with a [Limit]. Effects of this module cannot stack with the effects of the "Powerful" module.

Choose one:

One Die gains +2 Base Power.

2 Dice gain +1 Base Power.

name: Endless Battle
description: This skill gains: "If any Dice on this skill clash, give all Defensive, non-counter Dice on this skill +1 power, but you lose 5 HP."

name: Comeback
description:
Choose one:

One Die besides the final gains "[Clash Lose] Boost the power of the final Die by 2."

Any number of Dice besides the final gain "[Clash Lose] Boost the power of the final Die by 1."

(Exclude Counter Dice from this module and its effects.)

name: Counterplay
description:
Choose one option between Blunt, Pierce, Slash, Block, or Evade.

One Die gains: "[Check] When clashing against a {chosen type} Die, gain {Cost+1} Power."

name: Forceful
description:
One die gains: "[Clash Win] Target loses 2 Stagger Resist."

If the skill's cost is 3 or higher, apply this benefit to 2 Dice instead.

name: Heroic
description: One Block Die gains: "[Check] Power +2 if this skill intercepted the opposing attack."

name: Emotional Consequence
description: This skill gains: "[On Kill] Gain 4 Emotion Points."

name: Inspirational
description: This skill gains: "[Eminence] Whenever you would gain an Emotion Point from clashing, an ally of your choice gains them instead."

name: Bypass
description: This skill gains: "[Proactive] This attack cannot have its target changed, such as through interception."

name: Shield
description: This skill gains: "[After Use] Give all of your saved Defensive Dice to another ally."

name: Cut Through
description:
One Die gains: "[Hit] Remove 1 Protection, 1 Thorns, and 1 Aggro from the target."

If {cost} is 3 or higher, remove 2 of each instead.

name: Bonus Doubler
description:
One skill which is composed of only a single non-counter Offensive Die gains: "[Eminence] Double the bonus from Strength."

(Does not stack with similar effects.)

name: Desperate Struggle
description: This skill gains: "[Eminence] If you would become Staggered while using this skill, instead delay that stagger until the skill ends."

name: Double Defender
description: One Block Die gains: "[Check] Double the bonus from Endurance."

name: Fast
description:
Choose one:

This skill gains: "[On Use] Gain {Cost} Haste."
This skill gains: "[After Use] Gain {Cost-1} Haste."

If Haste gained would be 0, it becomes 1 instead.

name: Critical Bind
description:
One Die gains: "[Crit] Inflict 1 Bind."

If the Die's size is 1d10 or higher, inflict 2 instead.

This cannot be added to a Die that can already inflict Bind in any way.

name: Shields Up
description:
This skill gains: "[On Use] Gain {Cost} Protection."

If Cost is 0, this grants 1 instead.

name: Protective
description:
This skill gains: "[On Use] Grant 1 Protection to {Cost} allies." (can include self)

If Cost is 0, this grants to 1 ally instead.

name: Aggravate
description: This skill gains: "[After Use] Gain {Cost+1} Aggro."

name: Critical Fragility
description:
One Die gains: "[Crit] Inflict 1 Fragile."

If the Die's size is 1d10 or higher, inflict 2 instead.

This cannot be added to a Die that can already inflict Fragile in any way.

name: Cover Me
description:
This skill gains: "[On Use] Give an ally {Cost} Aggro."

If Cost is 0, this grants 1 instead.

name: Preventative Measures
description:
This skill gains: "[On Use] Gain {Cost} Safeguard."

If Cost is 0, this grants 1 instead.

name: Charging
description:
Choose one:

This skill gains: "[On Use] Gain {Cost} Charge."

This skill gains: "[After Use] Gain {Cost} Charge."

If Cost is 0, this grants 1 instead.

name: Kinetic Absorption
description:
Can only be applied to skills of Cost 2 or higher.

One Die gains: "[Clash Win] Gain 1 Charge."

If that Die is a Block Die, this grants 2 Charge instead.

name: Static Charge
description:
Up to {Cost} Dice gain: "[Clash Lose] Consume 2 HP to gain 1 Charge."

This cannot consume HP if you have less than the needed amount, or the amount would cause you to be defeated. If cost is 0, apply to 1 Die instead.

name: Siphon Energy
description:
One Die gains: "[Crit] Deal {X} additional damage and gain {X} Charge."

X equals 1 if the die size is d6 or smaller, 2 if size is d8 or d10, and 3 if size is d12.

name: Biofuel
description: This skill gains: "[On Kill] Gain 5 Charge."

name: Backup Power
description: This skill gains: "[Exhaust] Trigger all "Spend Charge" effects on this skill without actually spending Charge.

name: Charge Support
description:
This skill gains: "[On Use] Give another ally {Cost} Charge."

If Cost is 0, this grants 1 instead.

name: Impact Charger
description: One Die on this skill gains: "[Hit] Gain 1 Charge."

name: Powered Strike
description:
Can only be applied to skills of Cost 1 or higher.

One Offensive die on this skill gains: "[Hit] Spend up to {Cost} Charge to deal additional damage equal to 3 times the Charge spent."

name: Poised
description:
Choose one:

This skill gains: "[On Use] Gain {Cost} Poise."

This skill gains: "[After Use] Gain {Cost} Poise."

If Cost is 0, this grants 1 instead.

name: Lethal Precision
description: This skill gains: "[On Kill] Gain 6 Poise."

name: Recursive Crit
description:
One die gains: "[Crit] Gain X Poise."

X equals 1 if the die size is d8 or smaller, 2 if size is d10 or higher.

name: Mentoring
description:
This skill gains: "[On Use] Give another ally {Cost} Poise."

If Cost is 0, this grants 1 instead.

name: Seed
description:
One Defensive Die on this skill gains: "If this Die is saved and not used at the end of the scene, gain {Cost} Thorns at the start of the next scene."

If Cost is 0, this grants 1 instead.

name: Thorny
description:
{Cost} Dice gain: "[Clash Lose] Gain 1 Thorns."

If the Skill's Cost is 0, apply this benefit to 1 Die instead. If the skill's Cost exceeds the number of Dice, you may stack the Thorns gained by 1 on a single Die for every excess {Cost}.

name: Sudden Growth
description: This skill gains: "[Exhaust] Gain 3 Thorns and 1 Protection."

name: Burning
description:
Choose one: 

One Die gains: "[Hit] Inflict {Cost+1} Burn.

Any number of Dice gain: "[Hit] Inflict 1 Burn.

You may choose to replace [Hit] with [Clash Win].

name: Blazing
description:
Choose one:

One Die gains: "[Hit] Trigger Blaze on the target."

One Die gains: "[Clash Win] Trigger Blaze on the target."

name: Flame Step
description: One Evade Die gains "[On Evade] Inflict 1 Burn on the attacker."

name: Spontaneous Combustion
description:
Can only be applied to skills of Cost 1 or higher.

This skill gains: "[On Use] Gain {Cost+1} Burn, then trigger Blaze on self, spreading burn to enemies instead of allies."

name: Sinking
description:
Choose one:

One Die gains: "[Hit] Inflict {Cost+1} SInking."

Any number of Dice gain: "[Hit] Inflict 1 Sinking.

You may choose to replace [Hit] with [Clash Win].

name: Frightening
description:
Can only be applied to skills of Cost 2 or higher.

This skill gains: "[Eminence] If the user of an opposing skill has 6+ Sinking, reduce the power of all Dice on the opposing skill by 1."

name: Futility
description: One Evade Die gains "[On Evade] Inflict 1 Sinking on the attacker."

name: Grim Resolution
description:
Can only be applied to skills of Cost 1 or higher. 

This skill gains: "[On Use] Gain {Cost+1} Sinking and 1 Resolve."

If Cost is 3, this gives 2 resolve instead.

name: Bleeding
description:
Choose one:

One Die gains: "[Hit] Inflict {Cost} Bleed."

Any number of Dice gain: "[Hit] Inflict 1 Bleed."

name: Open Wounds
description: One Die gains: "[Hit] Deal additional damage equal to Bleed on the target."

name: Blood Burst
description: This skill gains: "[On Stagger] The target takes damage equal to 3 times their bleed."

name: Tremoring
description:
Choose one:

One Die gains: "[Hit] Inflict {Cost} Tremor."

Any number of Dice gain: "[Hit] Inflict 1 Tremor."

You may choose to replace [Hit] with [Clash Win].

name: Unstable Burst
description:
Choose one:

One Die gains: "[Hit] Trigger Tremor Burst, then reduce target's Tremor by 4."

One non-evade Die gains: "[Clash Win] Trigger Tremor Burst, then reduce target's Tremor by 4."

name: Quaking Fear
description: This skill gains: "[On Kill] Inflict 5 Tremor on all remaining enemeies."

name: Inertia
description:
Can only be applied to skills of Cost 1 or higher.

This skill gains: "[On Use] Gain {Cost+1} Tremor."

Increase the die size of one non-evade Die on this skill by 1 stage.

name: Revitalizer
description: THis skill gains: "[Limit: 5 Uses]" and "[After Use] Regain 1 Light."

name: Reliable
description:
One Die of size d6 or higher has its Die type reduced by 1 size and gains +2 Base Power.

You may also give this die: "[Check] If thie Die rolled minimum value, you may re-roll it once."

name: Health Hauler
description: One Die gains: "[Clash Win] Regain {Cost+2} HP."

name: Stamina Hauler
description: One Die gains: "[Clash Win] Regain {Cost+2} Stagger Resistance."

name: Nullify
description: This skill gains: "[Eminence] This skill and the opposing skill both ignore any changes in Power, with the exception of Base Power, and ignores other effects of [Check] tags."

name: Curative
description:
Choose one:

This skill gains: "[On Use] Reduce 1 Ailment on self by {Cost+2}."

This skill gains: "[After Use] Reduce 1 Ailment on self by {Cost+2}."

name: Deep Cuts
description: One Die gains: "[Hit] Deal 1 additional damage, plus 1 more or every 10 HP you are missing."

name: Keep Trucking
description: This skill gains: "[On Use] Regain 1 Stagger Resistance, plus 1 more for every 10 HP you are missing."

name: Emotionally Charged
description:
This skill gains: "[On Use] Gain {Cost} Emotion Points,."

If Cost is 0, this grants 1 instead.

name: Rebound Guard
description: One Block Die on this skill gains: "[Clash Win] Deal no stagger through the standard effects of Block Dice. If the opposing DIe is offensive, deal stagger equal to the opposing die's total value."

name: Resonant
description: One non-counter Die gains: "[Check] Gain Power equal to the highest total number of E.G.O passives active on one combatant."

name: Struggle
description:
Choose one:

One non-counter Die gains: "[Check] Power + {Cost+1} if the user is at or below half HP."

One counter Die gains: "[Check] Power + {Cost} if the user is at or below half HP."

name: Velocity
description: One Die gains: "[Check] Power + {Cost+1} when used at 8+ Speed."

name: Ongoing Struggle
description:
Choose one:

One non-counter Die gains: "[Check] +1 Power for every for every scene that's concluded this combat (max {Cost+2})."

One counter Die gains: "[Check] +1 Power for every scene that's concluded this combat (max {Cost})."

name: Desperation
description:
Choose one:

One non-counter Die gains: "[Check] If you have any Exhausted skills, gain Power equal to 1 + your total Exhausted skills. (max {Cost+2})."

One Counter Die gains: "[Check] If you have any Exhausted skills, gain Power equal to your total Exhausted skills (max {Cost})."

name: Outspeed
description:
Can only be applied to skills of Cost 1 or lower.

This skill gains: "[Proactive] Target cannot respond using Speed Dice whose value is lower than the used Speed Die by 5 or more."

(Deployed Dice are unaffected)

name: Unstable Tapping
description:
Can only be applied to skills of Cost 2 or higher.

This skill gains: "[On Use] You may spend 2 uses of a [Limit] skill to activate its [Exhaust] effect as if it were on this skill."

(This is an unnatural activation, unless the final use is spent.)

name: Cheating
description:
This skill gains "[Limit: 3 Uses]"

Gain a free Rank 3 Module on this skill. This does not count against the normal limit of 2 Rank 3 modules.

name: HP Ampule
description:
This skill gains: "[Limit: 5 Uses]" and "[After Use] Regain 10 HP."

When you reach Level 6, this increases to 15 HP. At Level 13, increase to 20 HP.

name: Transferral Edge
description: One Die gains: "[Hit] Transfer up to {Cost+1} of an Ailment from self to target."

name: Berserker
description:
Can only be applied to skills of Cost 2 or higher.

This skill gains: "[On Use] Gain 1 Strength and 2 Fragile."

name: Bunker
description:
Can only be applied to skills of Cost 2 or higher.

This skill gains: "[On Use] Gain 1 Endurance and 2 Bind."

name: Binding
description:
Choose one:

One Die gains: "[Hit] Inflict 1 Bind."

One Die gains: "[Clash Win] Inflict 1 Bind."

If this skill's Cost is 3 or higher, Inflict 2 instead.

name: Combat Chains
description: One Offensive Die gains: "[Clash Win] You may spend 3 Bind on foe to destroy the target's next Die."

name: Last Push
description: This skill gains "[Exhaust] Roll an additional Speed Die and add it to the scene. If this effect did not trigger naturally, gain 2 Haste instead."

name: Toughened
description:
This skill gains: "[On Use] Gain {Cost} Aggro and X Protection."

X is 1 if Cost is 1 or lower, or 2 if Cost is 2 or higher.

name: Shattering
description:
One Die gains: "[Hit] Inflict 1 Fragile."

If the skill's Cost is 3 or higher, you may apply this to 2 Dice instead. Or, if the skill is also composed of a single offensive Die, increase the value to 2 instead.

name: Steel Yourself
description:
This skill gains: "[On Use] Grant 1 Resolve to {Cost} allies."

If Cost is 0, this grants to 1 ally instead.

name: Sanctuary
description:
Choose one:

This skill gains: "[On Use] Give another ally {Cost} Safeguard."

This skill gains: "[After Use] Give another ally {Cost} Safeguard."

If Cost is 0, this grants 1 instead.

name: Static Current
description: One Evade Die gains: "[On Evade] Gain 1 Charge."

name: Boost Infliction
description: This skill gains: "[On Use] Spend 5 Charge to increase Ailments, Bind, and Fragile inflicted by this skill by 1.

name: Charge Ripper
description:
This skill gains: "[On Use] Spend 5 Charge to give all Dice on this skill +2 Power."

If the skill has only one Die, give it +4 Power instead.

name: Recharge
description: This skill gains: "[After Use] You may spend 5 Charge to regain 1 Light."

name: Controlled Breathing
description: One Evade Die Gains: "[On Evade] Gain 1 Poise"

name: Unbreakable Blockade
description: One non-counter Block Die gains: "[Clash Lose]" You may spend {Cost+2} Poise to recycle this Die."

name: Refined Technique
description: One Die gains: "[Clash Win] Gain 2 Poise."

name: Hazard Support
description:
This skill gains "[On Use] GIve another ally {Cost} Thorns.

If Cost is 0, this grants 1 instead.

name: Brambles
description:
This skill gains "[On Use] Gain {Cost} Thorns.

If Cost is 0, this grants 1 instead.

name: Fruits
description: This skill gains: "[After Use] Spend all Thorns on self; an ally of your choice regains that much HP (can include self)."

name: Flowers
description: This skill gains: "[After Use] Spend all Thorns on self; an ally of your choice regains that much Stagger Resist (can include self)."

name: Blumenwand
description:
This skill gains: "[After Use] You and up to {Cost} allies gain 1 Thorns."

If this skill has a Cost of 2 or more, you may gain 1 additional Thorns. This additional Thorns does not apply to chosen allies.

name: Burn Exploit
description:
Choose one:

One non-counter Die gains: "[Check] Power + {Cost+1} if the target has 6+ Burn."

One counter die gains: "[Check] Power + {Cost} if the target has 6+ Burn."

name: Kinetic Burn
description:
Cannot be applied to 0-Cost skills.

One die gains: "[Clash Win] If this skill's Speed Die is a higher value than the opposing skill's, inflict Burn equal to the difference (maximum of 10, deployed dice are at 0 speed)."

name: Inferno
description: One Die gains: "[Hit] Trigger Blaze on the target, then inflict 2 Burn."

name: Incinerate
description: One Die gains: "[Hit] You may spend 4 Burn on the target to inflict 2 Fragile.

name: Explosive Canister
description: This skill gains: "[Exhaust] Inflict 4 Burn on self and all enemies. Until the end of the skill, trigger Blaze on each hit."

name: Paralyzer
description: One Die gains: "[Crit] Inflict 1 Paralyze."

name: Sinking Exploit
description:
Choose one:

One non-counter Die gains: "[Check] Power + {Cost+1} if the target has 6+ Sinking."

One counter Die gains: "[Check] Power + {Cost} if the target has 6+ Sinking.

name: Sinking Deluge
description: One Die gains: "[Hit] You may spend 3 Emotion Points to trigger Sinking Deluge."

name: Nightmare Hunt
description: One Die gains: "[Hit] Absorb up to 3 Sinking from the target. If 3 Sinking was absorbed this way, gain 1 Strength next scene."

name: Tremor Exploit
description:
Choose one:

One non-counter Die gains: "[Check] Power + {Cost+1} if the target has 8+ Tremor."

One counter Die gains: "[Check] Power + {Cost} if the target has 8+ Tremor."

name: Burst
description:
Choose one:

One Die gains: "[Hit] Trigger Tremor Burst, then reduce the target's Tremor by 2."

One non-evade Die gains "[Clash Win] Trigger Tremor Burst, then reduce the target's Tremor by 2."

name: Tremor: Chain
description: One Die gains: "[Hit] If the target has 10+ Tremor, inflict 1 Feeble, or 2 if Tremor is 25+, then reduce Tremor by 2 for every Feeble inflicted this way."

name: Tremor: Fracture
description: One Die gains: "[Hit] If the target has 10+ Tremor, inflict 1 Disarm, or 2 if Tremor is 25+, then reduce Tremor by 2 for every Disarm inflicted this way."

name: Bleed Exploit
description:
Choose one:

One non-counter Die gains: "[Check] Power + {Cost+1} if the target has 3+ Bleed."

One counter Die gains: "[Check] Power + {Cost} if the target has 3+ Bleed.

name: Hemorrhage
description:
Can only be applied to skills of Cost 2 or higher.

One die of at least size d8 gains: "[Crit] Inflict Bleed equal to the target's Bleed cap."

name: Infectious Pathogen
description:
Can only be applied to skills of Cost 2 or higher.

This skill gains: "[After Use] Set another enemy's Bleed to half the count of the target."

This cannot reduce Bleed, only increase it.

name: Extra Die
description:
Add an additional Die to the skill, which can be before, after, or in-between any other Dice.

The Die can by any kind of non-counter Die. Its size is determined by the Cost of the skill: 1d4 for 0 Cost, 1d6 for 1 Cost, 1d8 for 2 Cost, 1d10 for 3 or higher Cost.

The Die is treated as if it was always there, so it benefits from existing "all Dice" effects and prevents the skill from benefitting from effects that apply to single-Die skills.

name: Counter
description:
Can only be applied to skills of Cost 1 or higher.

This skill gains "[After Use] Gain the following Counter Die: {X}" The size of the Counter Die in question depends on the Cost of the skill: 1d4 for 1 Cost, 1d6 for 2 Cost, 1d8 for 3 or higher Cost. Its type can be any Counter Type of your choice.

Modules can be added to this Counter Die, but the combined ranks of the modules cannot exceed 3.

name: Gift of Defense
description:
This skill gains: "[After Use] Give the following Saved Defensive Die to an ally (can include self): {X}" 

The size of the Defensive DIe in question depends on the Cost of the skill: 1d4 for 0 Cost, 1d6 for 1 Cost, 1d8 for 2 Cost, 1d10 for 3 or higher Cost. Its type can be Block or Evade.

Modules can be added to this Defensive Die as normal.

name: Crumble
description: One Die gains: "[Clash Win] You may spend 1 Light to destroy the target's next Die."

name: Sapper
description:
Can only be applied to skills of Cost 3 or higher.

One non-counter Die of size d6 or higher gains: "[Hit] Target loses 1 Light.", but its size is reduced by 1 stage.

name: Assist Attack
description:
Can only be applied to skills of Cost 3 or higher.

This skill gains: "[After Use] If at least 1 Offensive Die on this skill hits, another ally may use a skill with Cost 1 or lower against the same target without using a Speed Die. They must still spend Light as normal. During this attack, the target may only respond with saved Dice."

name: Extreme Critical
description: One Die gains: "[Crit] Deal additional damage and stagger equal to the max possible value of the die."

name: Panacea
description:
Can only be applied to skills of Cost 2 or higher.

This skill gains "[After Use] Remove all of 1 Ailment or Debuff on self."

name: Fervor
description: This skill gains: "Cost reduced by 1 while at least 3 E.G.O passive are active on self."

name: Universal Exploit
description: One non-counter Die gains: "[Check] Power +1 for every unique Ailment and Debuff on the target; Ailments at 10+ give +2 instead."

name: Crippling Blow
description: One Die gains: "[Crit] Inflict 1 Feeble and 1 Disarm."

name: Mighty
description:
Can only be applied to skills of Cost 2 or higher.

This skill gains: "[On Use] Gain 1 Strength."

name: Sturdy
description:
Can only be applied to skills of Cost 2 or higher.

This skill gains: "[On Use] Gain 1 Endurance."

name: Enfeebling
description: One Die gains: "[Hit] Inflict 1 Feeble."

name: Disarming
description: One Die gains: "[Hit] Inflict 1 Disarm."

name: Offense Formation
description:
Can only be applied to skills of Cost 2 or higher.

Choose 1:

This skill gains: "[On Use] Give another ally 1 Strength."

This skill gains: "[After Use] Give another ally 1 Strength."

name: Defensive Formation
description:
Can only be applied to skills of Cost 2 or higher.

Choose 1:

This skill gains: "[On Use] Give another ally 1 Endurance."

This skill gains: "[After Use] Give another ally 1 Endurance."

name: Fatal Fury
description: This skill gains: "[Exhaust] Lose 20 HP and gain 3 Strength, or 2 Strength if this effect did not trigger naturally."

name: Shackled
description:
Can only be applied to skills of Cost 3 or higher.

One Offensive Die gains: "[Clash Win] You may spend 5 Bind on foe to destroy the target's slowest unused Speed DIe."

name: Proliferate
description:
One Die gains: "[Hit]  Increase the value of all Ailments, as well as Fragile and Bind on foe by 1."

If this skill's Cost is 2 or higher, you may also give it "[Crit] Increase by an additional 1"

name: Neurotoxin
description:
One Die gains: "[Hit] Inflict 1 Paralyze"

If the Cost of this skill is 3 or higher, also give the Die +1 Base Power.

name: Wildfire
description:
Can only be applied to skills of Cost 1 or higher.

One DIe gains: "[Hit] Set target's Burn equal to the highest among combatants."

name: Sink With Me
description:
Can only be applied to skills of Cost 2 or higher

This skill gains: "[On Use] You may spend all your Emotion Points to inflict X Sinking on all enemies, where X is the amount spent -5. (Max. 15 Sinking inflicted)."

You may choose to make this effect [After Use] instead.

name: Stable Burst
description:
Choose one:

One Die gains "[Hist] Trigger Tremor Burst"

One non-evade Die gains "[Clash Win] Trigger Tremor Burst"

name: Tremor: Decay
description: One Die gains: "[Hit] Inflict 1 Fragile, plus one more for every 10 Tremor on the target, then reduce the target's Tremor by 2 for every Fragile inflicted this way."

name: Thorn Burst
description:
Can only be applied to skills of Cost 2 or higher.

One Die gains: "[Hit] Spend all your Thorns to deal that much damage to all other enemies, and twice as much damage to the target. Then lose Stagger Resist equal to Thorns spent."

name: Déracinée
description: This skill gains: "[Exhaust] After this skill ends, consume all Thorns on self, then distribute Bleed as evenly as possible amongst all enemies equal to twice the amount of Thorns consumed."

name: Charge Tandem
description:
This skill gains: "[On Use] You and another ally of your choice both gain {Cost} Charge."

If Cost is 0, this grants 1 instead. If Cost is 3 or higher choose a 3rd ally to gain 1 Charge.

name: mutilate
description:
One Die gains "[Hit] Inflict {Cost} Bleed, 1 Fragile, and 1 Bind."

If Cost is 0, inflict 1 Bleed instead.

name: Defibrillator
description: This skill gains: "[After Use] You may spend a total of 10 of any combination of Emotion Points and/or Charge to trigger Revival on one defeated ally. That ally cannot be revived by this skill again for the rest of combat"

name: Cleave Through Space
description: One Slash Die gains: "[Crit] Remove all Saved Dice from target, and halve target's Aggro, Protection, Thorns, and Safeguard. The opposing skill cannot give any of these things."

name: Pierce Through All
description:
This skill gains "[Eminence] All Pierce Dice on this skill treat affinities as 0"

All Pierce Dice on this skill gain +1 Base Power.

name: Bash Through Bodies
description: This skill gains. "[Eminence] On hit with a Blunt die, deal Blunt Damage and Stagger to a different enemy of your choice equal to half that Die's total power."

name: Blood Clot
description: This skill gains "[Eminence] Bleed has no effect on you or your target, and cannot be reduced."

name: Frustration
description: One Die gains: "[Clash Lose] Gain 1 Emotion Point."
